characters.name: Abelard
characters.description:
AbelardPortrayed ByUnknownFirst SeenMistery DateFull NameAbelardAlso Known AsAverar (by Gloria)GenderMaleOriginCalifornia, USAOccupationUnknownSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6Abelardis one ofCameron Tucker'sgay friends. He only makes a single cameo appearance in "Mistery Date" where was atJayandGloria'shouseand was painting a present for Jay and Gloria inthe baby'snew bedroom: A picture of Jay, Gloria andMannyon a cloud with a wall behind them. Because of the painting going on, Cameron kept Gloria outside all day to prepare.
Abelard was only seen leaving the house.

characters.name: Aidan Feldman
characters.description:
Aidan FeldmanPortrayed ByJoe AdlerFirst SeenArrestedFull NameAidan FeldmanGenderMaleOriginCalifornia, USAOccupationCollege StudentSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6Aidan Feldmanwas a student at the collegeHaley Dunphyattended during the first few episodes ofSeason 4. Aidan was only seen during Haley's disciplinary hearing as the student representative after Haley was bailed out of jail for underage drinking by herfather,motherandmaternal uncle.
He was offended when Haley said to him, "Nice to meet you" when they actually were in a class together, causing Aidan to respond "Seriously? We sit next to each other in Econ," showing that he was ignored in that class. Haley responded, "Oh, right. You--" but Aidan cut her off, saying that it insulted both him and Dean Miller, but mostly Aidan. He then started reading Haley's charges that included public drunkenness, resisting arrest and assaulting a police officer. Mitchell then stood up to attempt to speak on behalf of Haley. Aidan then asked Mitchell who he was to which Mitchell replied, "I'm Miss Dunphy's attorney," but Aidan told him that they required students to speak for themselves and that there were no attorneys allowed, as well as he shouldn't have been there, but allowed him to stay sitting in his chair, being super quiet and listening to Haley. Aidan does not seem to be quite a good dude, most likely stemming from being ignored. He also seemed to be quite disdainful towards Haley and also Mitchell.
characters.personality_section: Aidan does not seem to be quite a good dude, most likely stemming from being ignored. He also seemed to be quite disdainful towards Haley and also Mitchell.

characters.name: Aldo
characters.description: AldoFirst MentionedThe Future DunphysFull NameAldoGenderMaleOriginCalifornia, USAOccupationStudentFamilyUnnamed FatherUnnamed MotherSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6Aldois a school friend ofLilywho is mentioned in "The Future Dunphys". Lily tellsGloriathat that she's gay and thenCamandMitchinterrogate Lily to why she said that. Lily says they're learning about it in school; Aldo's parents are Italian, so he's Italian and Mitch and Cam were gay, so Lily's gay. The 3 adults then understood, but Mitch and Cam tried to tell her that Aldo was talking about his heritage and that it's something totally different from being gay, but later it was revealed that Lily was only saying this because she wanted to be more like her daddies.

characters.name: Alex Dunphy
characters.description: I find it ironic that I'm up here representing my classmates when...they're so...awesome, they should be up here themselves. But I'm up here, and I'm saying stuff because everybody's got their...stuff...whether you're popular, or a drama geek, or a cheerleader, or a nerd like me. We all have our insecurities; we're all just trying to figure out who we are. I guess what I'm trying to say is don't...stop...believing...and get this party started! —Alex Dunphy,See You Next Fall Alex DunphyPortrayed ByAriel WinterFirst SeenPilotLast SeenFinale Part 2Full NameAlexandra Anastasia DunphyAlso Known AsAlex, Big Al, A-Dog, Ice Queen, AdumpGenderFemaleOriginJanuary 14, 1997 (aged 12-23)Los Angeles California, USAOccupationResearch position in SwitzerlandHelo DynamicsStudentTemp at Pritchett Closets & Blinds (mentioned in S8 E12)Coffee Shop Barista (during a break from college)FamilyPhil Dunphy- FatherClaire Dunphy- MotherHaley Dunphy-Marshall- SisterLuke Dunphy- BrotherJay Pritchett- GrandfatherDeDe Pritchett† - GrandmotherMr. Pritchett† - Great-GrandfatherMrs. Pritchett† - Great-GrandmotherGloria Delgado-Pritchett- Step-GrandmotherFrank Dunphy† - GrandfatherGrace Dunphy† - GrandmotherLorraine Dunphy- Step-GrandmotherRay - Step-UncleMitchell Pritchett- UncleCameron Tucker- UncleManny Delgado- Step-UncleJoe Pritchett- Half-UnclePoppy Marshall- NieceGeorge Marshall- NephewLily Tucker-Pritchett- Adoptive CousinRexford Tucker-Pritchett- Adoptive CousinDylan Marshall- Brother in lawDonnie Pritchett- Great-UncleIrene Pritchett- Great-AuntMichael Pritchett- First Cousin RemovedBeBe Williams- Great-AuntCeCe Williams- Great-AuntSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6-S7-S8-S9-S10-S11Alexandra Anastasia "Alex" Dunphyis the middle child ofClaireandPhil Dunphy. Alex is evidently the most clever and intelligent of Claire and Phil's children. She is the older sister to her goofy brother,Lukeand the younger sister to her shallow sister,Haley. Although Alex is younger than most of the family, she is arguably the most intelligent and well-read member, even more thanMannyand her lawyer uncle,Mitchell("Other People's Children"). Being an overachiever, she tends to address people with sarcasm and condescension, although most of the time nobody gets her humor. She is also shown to be competitive just like her mother,Claire, which she admits is because she is not used to not coming in first. Having been raised by inexperienced parents, Alex learned to be extremely self-reliant at a young age that Phil once compared her to a self-cleaning oven ("Under Pressure"). Due to her abilities, her parents also tend to pay less attention to her concerns in favor of her less capable siblings. Alex often breaks thefourth wallwhen her family discusses ridiculous ideas and she feels like the odd ball. In "Grill, Interrupted", her grandfatherJayconfides to Alex that the family needs a leader and one day he will not be around to do it anymore, implying that in the future, she will be the one to keep the family
characters.personality_section: Although Alex is younger than most of the family, she is arguably the most intelligent and well-read member, even more thanMannyand her lawyer uncle,Mitchell("Other People's Children"). Having been raised by inexperienced parents, Alex learned to be extremely self-reliant at a young age that Phil once compared her to a self-cleaning oven ("Under Pressure"). Due to her abilities, her parents also tend to pay less attention to her concerns in favor of her less capable siblings. Alex often breaks thefourth wallwhen her family discusses ridiculous ideas and she feels like the odd ball. In "Grill, Interrupted", her grandfatherJayconfides to Alex that the family needs a leader and one day he will not be around to do it anymore, implying that in the future, she will be the one to keep the family in check because she is the only one who can do it. She enjoys messing her family when they are rude to her, which is fairly often, taking advantage of their inferior intellect by fooling them into believing unrealistic things. At one time she convinced Haley that she could charge electronics by rubbing the battery on her head and Luke that he could do the same by holding it in his mouth ("En Garde"). As much as she enjoys torturin

characters.name: Amber LaFontaine
characters.description: Amber LaFontainePortrayed ByAndrea AndersFirst SeenWon't You Be Our NeighborLast SeenKnock 'Em DownFull NameAmber LaFontaineGenderFemaleOriginCalifornia, USAFamilyRonnie LaFontaine- HusbandRonnie LaFontaine, Jr.- SonTammy LaFontaine- DaughterMrs. LaFontaine- Mother-in-LawMr. LaFontaine Jr.- Brother-in-LawSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6Amber LaFontainewas a loud and obnoxious woman who moved in next door tothe Dunphy residencealong with her husbandRonnie, daughterTammy, and sonRonnie Jr. Amber has appeared in 4 episodes

characters.name: Amber LaFontaine
characters.description: Amber LaFontainePortrayed ByAndrea AndersFirst SeenWon't You Be Our NeighborLast SeenKnock 'Em DownFull NameAmber LaFontaineGenderFemaleOriginCalifornia, USAFamilyRonnie LaFontaine- HusbandRonnie LaFontaine, Jr.- SonTammy LaFontaine- DaughterMrs. LaFontaine- Mother-in-LawMr. LaFontaine Jr.- Brother-in-LawSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6Amber LaFontainewas a loud and obnoxious woman who moved in next door tothe Dunphy residencealong with her husbandRonnie, daughterTammy, and sonRonnie Jr. Amber has appeared in 4 episodes

characters.name: Amelia
characters.description: AmeliaPortrayed ByRachael HarrisFirst SeenCaught in the ActFull NameAmeliaGenderFemaleOccupationRestaurant OwnerFamilyJackson- SonSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6-S7-S8-S9-S10Ameliais the no-nonsense owner of multiple successful restaurant chains, includingAmelia's, a popular chain named after her, and an unknown restaurant in Las Vegas. She has a son,Jackson, who attends the same pre-school asLily Tucker-Pritchett. In "Caught in the Act", after a restaurant owner by Amelia opens near them, Lily's adoptive parentsCameron TuckerandMitchell Pritchettset up a playdate with Jackson in order to get close to her. They are almost successful in getting a reservation, however Amelia is distracted by a work phone call and leaves the room. After hearing her yelling over the phone through a baby monitor, Cam and Mitch begin panicking. As a result, after Amelia leaves to deal with the phone call, Cam spills strawberry juice on her fifty thousand dollar carpet and the two attempt to cover it up. When she returns, they blame it on Jackson, but it turns out he's allergic to strawberries and Amelia freaks out. Mitch and Cam then confess, but at the same time they accidentally destroy a vase. Needless to say, they lose the reservation. Amelia appeared in 1 episode

characters.name: Ana-Maria Rosa de la Immaculada Jimenez Morales
characters.description: Ana-Maria Rosa de la Immaculada Jimenez MoralesFirst MentionedThe KissFull NameAna-Maria Rosa de la Immaculada Jimenez MoralesGenderFemaleOriginColombia, South AmericaFamilyUmberto† - Possible HusbandFulgencio† - Son or Son-in-LawPilar- Daughter or Daughter-in-LawGloria Delgado-Pritchett- GranddaughterSonia- Granddaughter2 Unnamed GrandsonsManny Delgado- Great-GrandsonJoe Pritchett- Great-GrandsonJay Pritchett- Grandson-in-LawJavier Delgado- Ex-Grandson-in-LawClaire Dunphy- Step-Great-GranddaughterMitchell Pritchett- Step-Great-GrandsonHaley Dunphy- Step-Great-Great-GranddaughterAlex Dunphy- Step-Great-Great-GranddaughterLuke Dunphy- Step-Great-Great-GrandsonLily Tucker-Pritchett- Adoptive Step-Great-Great-GranddaughterPhil Dunphy- Step-Great-Grandson-in-LawCameron Tucker- Step-Great-Grandson-in-LawSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6Ana-Maria Rosa de la Immaculada Jimenez MoraleswasGloria Delgado-Pritchett's grandmother. In "The Kiss", Gloria makes chunchullo, a traditional Colombian meal, in honor of her late grandmother Ana-Maria. Later, during the family's celebration, the whole family (except Gloria) has difficulty pronouncing her long name.

characters.name: Andre
characters.description: AndrePortrayed ByKevin HartFirst SeenTreehouseLast SeenPlanes, Trains and CarsFull NameAndreGenderMaleOriginCalifornia, USAOccupationOrthopedic SurgeonFamilyUnnamed WifeUnnamed DaughterSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6Andrewas an orthopaedic surgeon who had been the Dunphys' neighbor for eight years. He metPhil Dunphyin "Treehouse". After he watched Phil building a treehouse for his sonLuke, he offered to help him and the two became friends. In "Planes, Trains and Cars", he convinced Phil to buy a Porsche 911 convertible. When they went to show it to the family,Clairegot angry for buying that car and Andre rushed off due to his fear of women. Later, Phil finally wanted to sell the car to Andre, but Andre rejected the offer because he thought that is a "Katrina car". Phil then asked him if the real reason was because his wife did not leave him to keep it. Andre replied that he would never know it because he was afraid to ask her and he rushed off again.

characters.name: Andre
characters.description: AndrePortrayed ByKevin HartFirst SeenTreehouseLast SeenPlanes, Trains and CarsFull NameAndreGenderMaleOriginCalifornia, USAOccupationOrthopedic SurgeonFamilyUnnamed WifeUnnamed DaughterSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6Andrewas an orthopaedic surgeon who had been the Dunphys' neighbor for eight years. characters.name: Andre (unseen)
characters.description: AndreFirst MentionedPilotFull NameAndreGenderMaleOriginCalifornia, USAOccupationPainterSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6Andrewas a gay friend ofMitchell PritchettandCameron Tucker's. He was first mentioned in the "Pilot". Mitch and Cam arrived home with their recently adopted daughter,Lily, and Cam wanted to show Mitch her new bedroom. Mitch considered it beautiful until he noticed a painting that Andre painted after Cam asked him to do it. The painting consisted of Mitch and Cam looking like angels and standing on a cloud. Mitch thought that it was something really gay for Lily and demanded Cam to call Andre to paint something for her age. He was mentioned again in "Dance Dance Revelation". WhenMannyneeded a teal pocket square for his school dance,Jayphoned Mitch and Cam to ask them if they had it. Cam did, but soon realized that he lent it to Andre.

characters.name: Andrew
characters.description: AndrewPortrayed ByJeremy Scott JohnsonFirst SeenUndeck the HallsLast SeenThe More You Ignore MeFull NameAndrewGenderMaleOriginCalifornia, USAOccupationChristmas CarolerFamilySimon- HusbandMaya - Adopted daughter from KoreaSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6-S7 Andrewwas a Christmas caroler whoCameron Tuckersaid ousted him from an A Capella caroling group in 2008. In "Undeck the Halls", when Mitchell and Cameron took Lily to her first Christmas photo at the Mall, Cameron had to deal with the caroling group that he used to be part of before they kicked him out. AfterScott, the ex-mall Santa that got fired because of Cam and Mitchell (mainly the latter), convinced Cameron to be the better man, Cameron tried to be nice to Andrew. However, even his apology was "off-key", according to Andrew. Scott realized that Andrew was "being naughty" and punched him out.

characters.name: Andrew
characters.description: AndrewPortrayed ByJeremy Scott JohnsonFirst SeenUndeck the HallsLast SeenThe More You Ignore MeFull NameAndrewGenderMaleOriginCalifornia, USAOccupationChristmas CarolerFamilySimon- HusbandMaya - Adopted daughter from KoreaSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6-S7 Andrewwas a Christmas caroler whoCameron Tuckersaid ousted him from an A Capella caroling group in 2008. AfterScott, the ex-mall Santa that got fired because of Cam and Mitchell (mainly the latter), convinced Cameron to be the better man, Cameron tried to be nice to Andrew. However, even his apology was "off-key", according to Andrew. Scott realized that Andrew was "being naughty" and punched him out.

characters.name: Andrew Adler
characters.description: Andrew AdlerFirst MentionedGreat ExpectationsFull NameAndrew AdlerGenderMaleOriginCalifornia, USAOccupationStudentSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6Andrew Adleris one ofHaley Dunphy's friends who invites her to go to a party in "Great Expectations". JayandGloriaare having all the grandkids over for a slumber party, a tradition he calls "Jay's Night", but Haley feels like she is too old for family sleepovers and wants to go to Andrew Adler's party with her boyfriendDylan. Haley is unable to convince her parents to let her attend Andrew's party (which is only three blocks away from Jay's house) and ends up at his sleepover. She makes an attempt to sneak out of the house but is thwarted by Jay. But Gloria convinces him to change his mind, so he finds Dylan in the backyard and invites him in, saying he will allow him to take Haley to the party for a few hours. However, Dylan enjoys the family fun of "Jay's Night" and they end up not going to the party.

characters.name: Andy Bailey
characters.description: Andy BaileyPortrayed ByAdam DeVineFirst SeenThe HelpLast SeenThe EscapeFull NameAndrew BaileyAlso Known Asbittle-battle (byBeth) zucchini blossom (byBeth)GenderMaleOrigin7 November 1983 Utah, USAOccupationManny(formerly)RealtorFamilyMr. Bailey† - FatherMrs. Bailey - MotherEvan - CousinSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6-S7-S8-S9-S10 Andy BaileywasJoe Pritchett's former manny (male nanny),Phil Dunphy's former real estate assistant,Haley Marshall's ex-boyfriend (seeHandy) andBeth's ex-fiancé. Andy was notably the only character who was not a member of the family to be featured in talking head interviews. He grew up in Utah, and beforeGloriaoffered him a job, he worked for another family as their Manny. Andy became a quick friend to the whole Pritchett-Dunphy family, except forJaywho considered Andy to be a weird man like Phil, ("The Help"); however, in "Connection Lost," Jay told Claire that Andy was a good guy, just like Phil. Andy and Haley first met in "A Fair to Remember" and quickly started a hate-then-love relationship which unwound in "The Wedding." It was later revealed that he had feelings for Haley after asking if the latter meant anyone in particular when she told him that he deserved better when she said in general he left the wedding venue. In "The Cold," Haley and Andy shared their first kiss. Andy is described as a gentleman, with similar interests to Phil Dunphy. In "Other People's Children," it is shown that Andy has a lot of the same traits and shares a similar sense of humor as Phil. Andy and Phil share a fondness for doing British accents. Andy also has excellent comedic timing.

characters.name: Angela Wilkins
characters.description: Angela WilkinsFirst MentionedBaby on BoardFull NameAngela WilkinsAlso Known AsLady WilkinsGenderFemaleOriginCalifornia, USASeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6Angela Wilkinsis a prom date ofPhil Dunphy's from High School who is mentioned in "Baby on Board". During a dinner withClaire,Haley,Luke, andDylan, Phil comments his prom date with Angela, in whichhis fatherwas dressed as a limo driver to took Phil and Angela to a school dance. There, Frank announced their arrival shouting "Sir Philliam Dunphy and the Lady Wilkins!", making all the cool kids to laugh with them. Phil also claims that he hasn't seen her for 20 years.

characters.name: Armando
characters.description: ArmandoPortrayed ByHoratio SanzFirst SeenAmerican SkyperFull NameArmandoGenderMaleOriginColombia, South AmericaFamilyFulgencio† - UnclePilar- AuntGloria Pritchett- CousinSonia- Cousin2 Unnamed CousinsManny Delgado- First-Cousin-Once-RemovedJoe Pritchett- First-Cousin-Once-RemovedJay Pritchett- Cousin-in-LawJavier Delgado- Ex-Cousin-in-LawClaire Dunphy- Step-First-Cousin-Once-RemovedMitchell Pritchett- Step-First-Cousin-Once-RemovedHaley Dunphy- Step-Second-CousinAlex Dunphy- Step-Second-CousinLuke Dunphy- Step-Second-CousinLily Tucker-Pritchett- Adoptive Step-Second-CousinPhil Dunphy- Step-First-Cousin-Once-Removed-in-lawCameron Tucker- Step-First-Cousin-Once-Removed-in-lawSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6ArmandoisGloria Pritchett'scousin. Armando stayed atJay and Gloria's House, much to Jay's dismay. He thus attended Alex's graduation party as well. He had no lines at all and did not speak English. He ate and drank all Jay's supplies without cleaning. Jay mistakenly believed that Gloria's horse ashes are actually drugs. Gloria was fed-up with Jay's attitude because he treats her family member like criminals. After Gloria gives a toast to Alex, which makes Jay guilty, Jay finally allowed Armando to stay at his home. However, Gloria discovered that Armando had been stealing Jay's Cigars from their house, so she forced him to leave without telling Jay.

characters.name: Arvin Fennerman
characters.description: Dr. Arvin FennermanPortrayed ByChris GeereFirst SeenIn Your HeadLast SeenFinale Part 1/Finale Part 2Full NameArvin FennermanGenderMaleOrigin1988 (Age 37)London, United KingdomOccupationAstrophysics professor at CaltechFamilyMalcolm Fennerman- FatherIris Fennerman- MotherSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6-S7-S8-S9-S10-S11Dr. Arvin Fennermanwas a professor of the university that Alex was in, called California Institute of Technology (also known as Caltech). He was alsoHaley Marshall's ex-boyfriend andAlex Dunphy's current boyfriend. Arvin first appeared in "In Your Head" when Haley snuck into Alex's class to get her to read over her writing sample before she went to an interview at Nerp. Haley ended up interrupting the class before Alex rushed her out. Arvin later found both of them in the school yard and told Haley that the two of them would get married one day, that he didn't understand it, but he just knew because all the probability scenes he had been running in his head ended up with the two of them marrying. Haley later used a similar speech to get the job she was applying for and later ended up accepting his contact request. It was unclear whether Arvin actually believed this or if it was just a clever pick-up line. Arvin was a two-time Vanderscoff Grant winner: one for philosophy and one for geometry.

characters.name: Arvin Fennerman
characters.description: Dr. Arvin FennermanPortrayed ByChris GeereFirst SeenIn Your HeadLast SeenFinale Part 1/Finale Part 2Full NameArvin FennermanGenderMaleOrigin1988 (Age 37)London, United KingdomOccupationAstrophysics professor at CaltechFamilyMalcolm Fennerman- FatherIris Fennerman- MotherSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6-S7-S8-S9-S10-S11Dr. Arvin Fennermanwas a professor of the university that Alex was in, called California Institute of Technology (also known as Caltech). He was alsoHaley Marshall's ex-boyfriend andAlex Dunphy's current boyfriend. Arvin first appeared in "In Your Head" when Haley snuck into Alex's class to get her to read over her writing sample before she went to an interview at Nerp. Haley ended up interrupting the class before Alex rushed her out. Arvin later found both of them in the school yard and told Haley that the two of them would get married one day, that he didn't understand it, but he just knew because all the probability scenes he had been running in his head ended up with the two of them marrying. Haley later used a similar speech to get the job she was applying for and later ended up accepting his contact request. It was unclear whether Arvin actually believed this or if it was just a clever pick-up line. Arvin was a two-time Vanderscoff Grant winner: one for philosophy and one for geometry.

characters.name: Asher
characters.description: AsherPortrayed ByJesse EisenbergFirst SeenUnder PressureFull NameAsherGenderMaleOriginCalifornia, USASeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6-S7-S8-S9-S10-S11 AsherwasMitchell PritchettandCameron Tucker's new environmentalist and ecologist neighbor who appeared in "Under Pressure". After Mitch andLilymet him, Mitch was offended when Asher claimed that he was not as environmentally friendly as he was. WhenHaleyshowed up with her old dollhouse for Lily, Mitch told Haley about Asher, and she advised him to show him his environmental award. While they were trying to get the dollhouse out of Haley's car, the Styrofoam peanuts blew into Asher's yard. Haley and Lily then tried to help, but aggravated the situation by mistake.

characters.name: Aurelio
characters.description: AurelioFirst MentionedLarry's WifeFull NameAurelioGenderMaleOriginColombia, South AmericaFamilyFulgencio† - UnclePilar- AuntGloria Pritchett- CousinSonia- Cousin2 Unnamed CousinsManny Delgado- First Cousin Once RemovedJoe Pritchett- First Cousin Once RemovedJay Pritchett- Cousin-in-LawJavier Delgado- Ex-Cousin-in-LawClaire Dunphy- Step-First Cousin Once RemovedMitchell Pritchett- Step-First Cousin Once RemovedHaley Dunphy- Step-Second CousinAlex Dunphy- Step-Second CousinLuke Dunphy- Step-Second CousinLily Tucker-Pritchett- Adoptive Step-Second CousinPhil Dunphy- Step-First Cousin-in-Law Once RemovedCameron Tucker- Step-First Cousin-in-Law Once RemovedSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6AurelioisGloria Pritchett'scousin. characters.name: Balaban
characters.description: BalabanPortrayed ByAndrew BorbaFirst SeenCoal DiggerLast SeenMy Funky ValentineFull NameBalabanAlso Known AsPrincipal BalabanGenderMaleOccupationMiddle School PrincipalSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6-S7-S8-S9-S10S11Balabanwas the principal of theelementary schoolattended byManny DelgadoandLuke Dunphy. In "Coal Digger", Manny and Luke ended up in Principal Balaban's office after getting into a fight caused by Manny referring to Luke as his nephew and Luke calling Manny's motherGloria Pritchetta coal digger. Gloria and her second husband - Manny's stepfather -Jay Pritchettand Luke's parents,ClaireandPhil Dunphywere then called and arrived in the office, but Balaban became confused when he found out that all of them were related and Luke was actually technically Manny's nephew. He then dismissed the family, telling them that the issue should have been dealt with at home and that the children should have gotten back to their classes. In "My Funky Valentine", Phil and Claire, roleplaying asClive BixbyandJulianaon Valentine's Day, met Principal Balaban in a mall, when Claire got her coat stuck in an escalator going up, and Phil turned it off. Along with Luke's math teacher, Mrs. Passwater and one of Phil's clients, Tom Mickleson, Balaban attempted to help Claire, not knowing that she was naked underneath the coat. Phil, however, soon convinced them to leave by lying that somebody was on their way to help.

characters.name: Barb Tucker
characters.description: Barb TuckerPortrayed ByCelia WestonFirst SeenMother TuckerLast SeenA Tale of Three CitiesFirst MentionedFifteen PercentFull NameBarbara Jammy TuckerAlso Known AsBarbGenderFemaleOriginMissouri, USAFamilyUnnamed MotherMerle Tucker- HusbandCameron Tucker- SonPam Tucker- Daughter2 Other Unnamed ChildrenMitchell Pritchett- Son-in-LawLily Tucker-Pritchett- Adoptive GranddaughterRexford Tucker-Pritchett- Adoptive GrandsonCalhoun Johnson- GrandsonSeasonsS2-S5-S8Barbara Jammy "Barb"  TuckerisCameronandPam Tucker's mother and alsoMerle's wife. She is first seen in "Mother Tucker". When she arrives to the Tucker-Pritchett house, Mitchell feels uncomfortable, due to Barb's inappropriate touching on him. FollowingClaire's advice, Mitchell tries to prove to Cameron that his mother is more than handsy but every time he tries to do it, Cameron is looking the other way. When finally realizing about the situation is when Mitchell is sticking his fanny for Barb to touch. Mitchell eventually confronts Cameron about his mother's inappropriate touching, not realizing that she is behind him. This hurts Barb's feeling before she finally realizes she has touched him inappropriately and apologizes, unfortunately this happens while Mitchell is in the bathtub. She reappears in "ClosetCon '13", when Cameron, Mitchell and Lily visit Cam's birthplace Missouri. She is still touching Mitch and making him feel uncomfortable.

characters.name: Barbara
characters.description: BarbaraFirst MentionedMoon LandingFull NameBarbaraGenderFemaleOriginCalifornia, USAOccupationPhil's AssistantSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6BarbaraisPhil Dunphy'sassistant at his Real State Company. In "Moon Landing", she calls Phil and tells him that one of his clients, the Pattersons, want to back out of deal, and the wife will call him to talk about it. She also asks him if he has seen that his bus stop billboard has a mustache drawn on him, and Phil replies he has already seen it.

characters.name: Barry
characters.description: BarryPortrayed ByJames MarsdenFirst SeenSlow Down Your NeighborsFull NameBarryGenderMaleOriginCalifornia, USAOccupationReiki MasterSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6Barryis a Reiki master who is seen in "Slow Down Your Neighbors". He was a homeless man who temporarily lived inLily's princess castle. MitchellandCameronsaw a stranger in their hot tub. They were about to call the police until he stood up and they saw a man who had nice abs. They rethought their decision and joined the stranger, whose name was Barry, in the hot tub. Barry revealed that he just moved into the apartment upstairs and thought that the hot tub was for the whole building. He told Cameron and Mitchell a a story about how he calmed down a fox and told it that he's in charge, just by staring at it. He mentioned that he's an expert in Reiki and took all the negative vibes out of Cameron, filling him with positive ones instead through Reiki.

Jay mentioned that years ago, he was sitting next to CeCe at Thanksgiving dinner and the latter appeared to be charmed by the former. CeCe started rubbing her size 12s up and down Jay's shin. Dede caught her, went over the table at CeCe and lunged at her. It took Jay and BeBe (DeDe's other sister) to separate them.

She was first mentioned in "The Kiss" when Jay told everyone that his father had kissed him one time in Jay's entire life and that was when one time he came up behind Jay, kissed him on the back of the head and said "Goodnight, Becky.", thinking that Jay was Becky. Becky had a son named Brian and it was his wedding in which Jay, DeDe, Claire and Mitchell attended in the episode "Sarge & Pea".

characters.name: Ben
characters.description: BenPortrayed ByJoe MandeFirst SeenCloset? You'll Love It!Last SeenIt's the Great Pumpkin, Phil DunphyFull NameBenGenderMaleOriginCalifornia, USAOccupationMarketing manager atPritchett's Closets & BlindsFamilyUnnamed MotherSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6-S7-S8-S9 Ben(c. 1990) works forPritchett's Closets & Blinds. He still lives with his mother, who is an alcoholic. He looks up toJayand is often seen working forClaire, even though neither one of them seem to think highly of him. Ben started datingAlexin "Do You Believe in Magic", after she found out that he had been sending her flowers as a secret admirer. They would later break up in "It's the Great Pumpkin, Phil Dunphy". He appeared in 12 episodes.

characters.name: Ben Dugan
characters.description: Ben DuganPortrayed ByChristopher SheaFirst SeenTravels with ScoutFull NameBenjamin Dugan (possibly)GenderMaleOriginCalifornia, USAOccupationActorSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6Ben DuganwasMitchell Pritchett'sold drama club friend from High School. In "Travels with Scout", he encounteredJay Pritchettwhen he was takingMannyto the dentist. Ben told him that he kept acting and was starring in a new film namedMaple Drive. Jay, not knowing that it was a horror film, decided to take Manny to the film. Manny was completely frightened by the movie. While Jay was fixing the broken doorbell (which repeatedly rang), Manny thought that it was a demon and got his fencing sword. Jay promisedGloriathat his fear would only last a while, although he realized that they had to do something when Manny began sleeping in their bed. He then asked Ben to come to show Manny how likable he was and not scared anymore. When Ben arrived, he knocked on the window since the doorbell still did not work. Manny noticed him, and when Ben noticed him, he said "Are you Manny? I'm here for you." Due to the lighting on his face and his fake machete, Manny became especially frightened of him and rushed upstairs, much to Jay's disbelief.

characters.name: Beth
characters.description: BethPortrayed ByLaura Ashley SamuelsFirst SeenCloset? You'll Love It!Last SeenWhite ChristmasFull NameBethAlso Known AsPumpkin (byAndy)Popcorn Shrimp (byAndy)GenderFemaleOrigin1990 California, USAOccupationUS Coast GuardFamilyUnnamed Uncle[1]Unnamed MotherSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6-S7 Popcorn Shrimp (byAndy) Bethwas the ex-girlfriend and ex-fiancée ofAndy Bailey. She worked in the US Coast Guard. The family viewed her as a sweet and caring person, although Haley didn't, when Haley first met Beth, she was convinced that she was trying to hurt or kill Haley, as there may have been a flirtatious vibe between Haley and Andy. We saw that Beth made Haley sit next to a candle, however Haley was unaware it was there. Beth made the conscious decision to pet Haley's hair and put it nearer to the candle. Haley's hair starts to burn, but Gloria put it out when she saw it, which made Haley become more suspicious of her.

characters.name: Bethenny
characters.description: BethennyPortrayed ByArtemis PebdaniFirst SeenDance Dance RevelationLast SeenGo Bullfrogs!Full NameBethennyGenderFemaleOriginCalifornia, USAFamilyEthan- NephewSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6Bethennywas a friend ofClaire Dunphy's. In "Dance Dance Revelation", she helped Claire,Gloria, and other mothers organizeLukeandManny's middle school dance. In "Go Bullfrogs!", she was seen along with Holly and her friend at Holly's house when Claire came to give Luke his retainer.

characters.name: Bianca Douglas
characters.description: Bianca DouglasPortrayed ByKaitlyn DeverFirst SeenFizboFull NameBianca DouglasGenderFemaleOriginCalifornia, USAOccupationStudentSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6Bianca DouglaswasManny Delgado's crush in "Fizbo". Manny first tried to impress her atLuke's birthday party by explaining her jokes, but it did not work. But later,Jayaccidentally shot with a crossbow, Luke's gift, to the bouncy castle where Bianca was, deflates, and she got trapped. Manny then entered the castle to rescue her and he finally won her heart. However, at the end of the episode, Manny revealed that she had called him three times and he started to feel smothered. Bianca also thought ofHaley's boyfriendDylanas "so cute and tall" when she saw him.

characters.name: Bill
characters.description: BillPortrayed ByJimmy TatroFirst SeenRoyal VisitLast SeenThe Last HalloweenFull NameBillGenderMaleOriginCalifornia, USAOccupationFirefighterSeasonsS1-S2-S3-S4-S5-S6-S7-S8-S9-S10-S11 Billwas a firefighter who metAlexwhen she burned a bagel bite in the microwave in her dorm room after over indulging in a pity party over her sisterHaleydating her school professor and crushArvin. Bill woke her up and carried her out of the smokey room. Bill and Alex started dating soon after that. Bill was a muscular guy with a lot of extreme stories to tell, but he was not very smart, which tended to collide with Alex as she is quite smart. He had a lot of respect forPhilandClaire, seeing how he wanted their opinion on his latest invention and telling Phil inStand By Your Manthat, according to him, one of the most difficult things of dating Alex (aside from the difficult words) was that she grew up with a perfect guy in her life, which is hard to live up to. Bill was a muscular guy with a lot of extreme stories to tell, but he was not very smart, which tended to collide with Alex as she is quite smart.
